# Gestion Velora — Full Content Index (repository pointer)

The full machine-readable content index is maintained at:

  Web:  https://www.gestionvelora.com/llms-full.md

It covers company identity, all service descriptions, blog article summaries,
location pages, regulatory context, editorial standards, and AI discovery
endpoints for Gestion Velora (Montreal, Quebec, Canada).
